All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values

D

DIRECTORIES_FIRST - Enum constant in enum class timgutilities.textio.DirectoryListOrderType
The result of a list directory operation will place directories in the list before files.
DIRECTORY - Enum constant in enum class timgutilities.textio.DirectoryEntry.Type
this DirectoryEntry relates to a directory Files.isDirectory(Path) returns true)
DIRECTORY_AND_FILE - Enum constant in enum class timgutilities.textio.DirectoryListFilterType
Returns DirectoryEntry instances for both files and sub directories when listing a directory
DIRECTORY_ONLY - Enum constant in enum class timgutilities.textio.DirectoryListFilterType
Only returns DirectoryEntry instances for sub directories when listing a directory.
DirectoryEntry - Class in timgutilities.textio
Returned by many of the TextIOUtils list directory entries and directory entry chooser methods
DirectoryEntry(String, DirectoryEntry.Type, Path) - Constructor for class timgutilities.textio.DirectoryEntry
Build the entry
DirectoryEntry.Type - Enum Class in timgutilities.textio
represents the type of DirectoryEntry, used for names and so on and to make working things out easier
DirectoryListFilterType - Enum Class in timgutilities.textio
The various mode supported for filtering DirectoryEntries when listing them.
DirectoryListOrderType - Enum Class in timgutilities.textio
enum to control the output order when listing directory entries.
DirectorySelectionMode - Enum Class in timgutilities.textio
When chosing a file how should the chooser code behave, for example is navigation across directories allowed, or can only files be selected (useful for opening a file - opening a directory is invalid) or perhaps only directories can be selected (usefull for locating a directory so save a file).
doOutput(String) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
Output text in a manner that is compatible with prompts from the input routines
